series_metadata.series_description: This file contains official documents from ORDC bi-monthly Commission meetings and includes such items as agendas, resolutions, approved project briefings, scopes of work, minutes and audio tapes.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Microform: microfilm and scanned files permanently. ; Paper: entire packet a period of five (5) years. 5-year period, scan all documents in packet. ; Electronic: audio tapes and audio files written meeting minutes are approved
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
